text: "The islands."... So the Hebrews called all the remote countries to which they went by ships to Judea, as Greece, Italy, Spain, etc.

"A stout hunter"... Not of beasts, but of men; whom by violence and tyranny he brought under his dominion. And such he was, not only in the opinion of men, but before the Lord; that is, in his sight who cannot be 
deceived.
